title: Kielbasa and Vegetables Stir Fry
description: A Chinese-inspired dish combining the flavors of kielbasa with stir-fried vegetables and a hint of polish flavors.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the kielbasa and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the kielbasa from the skillet and set aside.
Add the onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until tender, about 4-5 minutes.
Add the stew, soy sauce, ginger, and garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Return the kielbasa to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the sugar snap peas and cook until tender, about 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the kielbasa and vegetables hot, garnished with sliced green onions if desired.
